homepage.text_excerpt:
CMA Machine Tools - We specialise in CNC Machinery
We specialise in CNC Machining Centers and Tapping Machines
CNC Machining Centers and Tapping Machines
CMA Machine Tools UK specialises in the provision of CNC Machining Centers and Tapping Machines, operating as a globally recognized organisation with our UK base situated in the North West of England. Our innovative system, developed by CMA, facilitates the movement of the machine head along three axes, namely X, Y, and Z.
Primarily focused on delivering superior quality, bespoke Machining Centers and Tapping Machines, our solutions are characterised by flexibility and unparalleled workforce efficiency. Moreover, our Machining Centers enable uninterrupted production, eliminating downtime and ensuring seamless operational continuity.
Why choose CMA MACHINE Tools?
Our design process enables operators to safely load and unload one side of the machine while the spindle is actively engaged in operation. This operational feature ensures a seamless workflow by allowing the simultaneous loading or unloading of materials on one side while the machine is actively processing on the opposite side.
All of our machines have been meticulously crafted in-house. Tailored to meet specific requirements, these machines are built to order with a focus on enhancing efficiency and reducing production costs for our esteemed clientele.
These bespoke machine tools boast bed working sizes ranging from 3 meters to 25 meters in length and 0.5 meters to 3 meters in width. This extensive range enables the handling of diverse parts that may be encountered in any manufacturing facility.
With a torque capacity of 500Nm and a spindle speed of up to 6000RPM, our machines prioritise flexibility as a key component. This exceptional performance ensures adaptability to various manufacturing demands, further solidifying the versatility of our CNC Drilling and Tapping Machines.
Facilities
We have 10,000 m² of land, located in Alzira (Valencia), within which our 3 warehouses and our offices are located.
Tapping Machines
We design and manufacture +1000 industrial tapping machines.
Machining Centers
We produce +100 machining centers per year.
Production
All our machines are produced at our headquarters in Spain and are shipped worldwide.
Competitiveness
We increase your productivity and improve your performance taking into account the possible challenges you encounter.
Punctuality
The excellent work of all our staff makes it possible for all deadlines to be met and each and every order to be delivered within the estimated time.
Experience
We always find the best solution for our clients to achieve their goals thanks to our extensive experience over the years.
Innovation
We always try to look for advances so that our machines achieve an optimal degree of technology.
TAPPING
CMA Machine Tools have designed a triple articulated tapping machine which is stable and precise. With the option of adding an adjustable 360° tapping head.
